author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(nuxt): only write $nuxt if it's writable (algolia/vue-instantsearch#1117)
body:
* fix(nuxt): only write $nuxt if it's writable

In some nuxt 2 cases (https://github.com/algolia/vue-instantsearch/commit/783367992955e86cc70708908455f666d3aed725#commitcomment-67430759) this.$nuxt is already defined by the framework, but not a setter, so we can't make it equal to the $nuxt of the component.

Luckily in Nuxt 2, setting $nuxt isn't crucial, and can thus be skipped.

* Update src/util/createServerRootMixin.js

* Update src/util/createServerRootMixin.js

Co-authored-by: Dhaya <154633+dhayab@users.noreply.github.com>
